response_constraints: Retrieve the existing summary before issuing the dependent summary update.
Confirm the change only after memory_update_summary succeeds, without claiming unrelated memories changed.

stages.purpose: Read the current recursive summary so its unrelated facts can be preserved.

arguments.summary: Holiday hosting: dinner at 6:00 p.m. Sam brings dessert. Table linens are at the cleaner.

stages.purpose: Write the revised full summary after incorporating the retrieved content and the user's single requested change.

state_assertions: summary == "Holiday hosting: dinner at 6:00 p.m. Sam brings dessert. Table linens are at the cleaner."

prompt: Open the holiday-hosting summary, change dinner from 5:30 p.m. to 6:00 p.m., and retain the dessert and linen notes.

tool_results.summary: Holiday hosting: dinner at 5:30 p.m. Sam brings dessert. Table linens are at the cleaner.
